title: podman-remote stop
body:
add stop to the container subcommands for the remote client. the stop
function is already done.  this is a graphical change only.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@vrothberg can we put some sort of message here on how to recover from this?
`tree is dirty, please commit all changes and sync the vendor.conf` means to run `make vendor` and commit the changes. We can make this clearer, sure.
The reasons why it's failing is an upstream change in vndr letting the go.mod files into the vendor tree. I suggest we just add the files here and push for using `go mod` here.
stop changes LGTM.  I'll let you and @vrothberg work through the mod fun.  rootless test looks to be flaking to add to the fun.
